.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(57, 53, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(57, 53, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a273f 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a273f, color-mix(in srgb, #2a273f 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a273f 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a273f, color-mix(in srgb, #2a273f 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(57, 53, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(57, 53, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(57, 53, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(62, 143, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(62, 145, 177) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
